default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss SEMrush usage, API integration, and potential partnership opportunities for fwd.digital's growing agency needs.](https://fathom.video/share/RowASisbt63GLyReQymtnfZNhK5m29Uj?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [fwd.digital is rapidly growing (0 to $2M in months) and currently has 11 users on SEMrush, expanding to 15 soon](https://fathom.video/share/RowASisbt63GLyReQymtnfZNhK5m29Uj?tab=summary&timestamp=64.0)
  - [They're building custom AI workflows using SEMrush API for automated SEO tasks, but current pricing is unsustainable](https://fathom.video/share/RowASisbt63GLyReQymtnfZNhK5m29Uj?tab=summary&timestamp=100.0)
  - [SEMrush team will explore customized pricing options and potential partnership opportunities to accommodate fwd.digital's unique use case and growth trajectory](https://fathom.video/share/RowASisbt63GLyReQymtnfZNhK5m29Uj?tab=summary&timestamp=1051.0)

## Topics

### Current SEMrush Usage and Challenges

  - [11 current users, expanding to 15 soon; potential to double within a year](https://fathom.video/share/RowASisbt63GLyReQymtnfZNhK5m29Uj?tab=summary&timestamp=299.0)
  - [SEMrush is currently their biggest expense](https://fathom.video/share/RowASisbt63GLyReQymtnfZNhK5m29Uj?tab=summary&timestamp=113.0)
  - [Using both platform UI and API for various SEO tasks](https://fathom.video/share/RowASisbt63GLyReQymtnfZNhK5m29Uj?tab=summary&timestamp=64.0)
  - [Challenge: Triple-paying scenario (agency account, API access, client accounts)](https://fathom.video/share/RowASisbt63GLyReQymtnfZNhK5m29Uj?tab=summary&timestamp=198.0)
  - [Offshore talent makes per-user cost prohibitively expensive](https://fathom.video/share/RowASisbt63GLyReQymtnfZNhK5m29Uj?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)

### Custom AI Workflows and API Usage

  - [Building automation for keyword research and content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/RowASisbt63GLyReQymtnfZNhK5m29Uj?tab=summary&timestamp=85.0)
  - [Using AirOps platform with SEMrush API integration](https://fathom.video/share/RowASisbt63GLyReQymtnfZNhK5m29Uj?tab=summary&timestamp=52.0)
  - [Complex workflows include:](https://fathom.video/share/RowASisbt63GLyReQymtnfZNhK5m29Uj?tab=summary&timestamp=517.0)
      - [Keyword gap analysis between clients and competitors](https://fathom.video/share/RowASisbt63GLyReQymtnfZNhK5m29Uj?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
      - [Clustering and AI-driven relevance assessment](https://fathom.video/share/RowASisbt63GLyReQymtnfZNhK5m29Uj?tab=summary&timestamp=631.0)
      - [Programmatic SEO (e.g., automated title/meta description updates)](https://fathom.video/share/RowASisbt63GLyReQymtnfZNhK5m29Uj?tab=summary&timestamp=462.0)
  - [API usage unclear due to compute-intensive processes (e.g., 3,000-4,000 assignments per workflow)](https://fathom.video/share/RowASisbt63GLyReQymtnfZNhK5m29Uj?tab=summary&timestamp=385.0)

### Potential Solutions and Next Steps

  - [Explore SEMrush integrations for reporting (e.g., GA, GSC) to reduce API calls](https://fathom.video/share/RowASisbt63GLyReQymtnfZNhK5m29Uj?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)
  - [Investigate custom pricing options for both user accounts and API usage](https://fathom.video/share/RowASisbt63GLyReQymtnfZNhK5m29Uj?tab=summary&timestamp=1006.0)
  - [Discuss potential agency program or startup program participation](https://fathom.video/share/RowASisbt63GLyReQymtnfZNhK5m29Uj?tab=summary&timestamp=854.0)
  - [Consider data-sharing partnership opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/RowASisbt63GLyReQymtnfZNhK5m29Uj?tab=summary&timestamp=883.0)

### Growth Projections and Future Needs

  - [Currently at 20 clients, aiming for 100 by end of next year](https://fathom.video/share/RowASisbt63GLyReQymtnfZNhK5m29Uj?tab=summary&timestamp=73.0)
  - [Anticipate significant increase in API usage with growth](https://fathom.video/share/RowASisbt63GLyReQymtnfZNhK5m29Uj?tab=summary&timestamp=864.0)
  - [Need for scalable pricing structure to remain sustainable](https://fathom.video/share/RowASisbt63GLyReQymtnfZNhK5m29Uj?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Meeting scheduled: Wednesday at 3 PM PT / 5 PM CT with Marcel and Kevin (SEMrush product specialist)](https://fathom.video/share/RowASisbt63GLyReQymtnfZNhK5m29Uj?tab=summary&timestamp=983.0)
  - [Marcel to provide more detailed demo of custom workflows during the meeting](https://fathom.video/share/RowASisbt63GLyReQymtnfZNhK5m29Uj?tab=summary&timestamp=517.0)
  - [Kevin to prepare in-depth questions to assess fwd.digital's specific needs](https://fathom.video/share/RowASisbt63GLyReQymtnfZNhK5m29Uj?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)
  - [SEMrush team to explore customized pricing options and potential partnership opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/RowASisbt63GLyReQymtnfZNhK5m29Uj?tab=summary&timestamp=1040.0)
  - [Ongoing discussions to find a mutually beneficial arrangement that supports fwd.digital's growth](https://fathom.video/share/RowASisbt63GLyReQymtnfZNhK5m29Uj?tab=summary&timestamp=1051.0)

action_items.description: Brief Kevin on Marcel's use case & ensure he watches meeting recording before Wed meeting
Prepare demo of custom workflows & API usage for Wed meeting w/ Kevin
Send calendar invite for Wed 3PM PT meeting w/ Marcel & Kevin (note - may show wrong time initially)
